name: 養母斷指護女（情感爆發高潮）
name_en: Foster Mother Cuts Finger to Protect Daughter (Emotional Climax)
description: 面對獅家的道德綁架和鄰居的輿論壓力，養母用斷指的方式「償還」生育之恩，從此女兒與獅家再無瓜葛。極端的自我犧牲引發觀眾強烈的感動和對獅家的憤怒。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Fine. Whatever she owes you, I will pay it back. ... I repaid it for you. the debt of her carrying you for 10 months. In the future, you and the Lion's family have nothing to do with each other anymore.
